summary: High‑quality soundboard recording of a beautiful acoustic set, showcasing Charlie’s meticulous archiving work.
review: Both reviewers rave about the newly surfaced acoustic portion, calling it “beautiful” and praising the care put into preserving the tape. The SBD source is described as pristine with no audible flaws, making this a must‑listen for fans who appreciate the quieter side of the Dead and Charlie’s dedication to archival quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 5‑star, highlighting an excellent acoustic performance and flawless soundboard recording; the consistency and detail give strong confidence in a top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No issues reported; reviewers describe the audio as beautiful, clear, and professionally captured.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The acoustic set is highlighted as a standout moment that adds depth and intimacy to the overall concert experience.
